positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest scene. Giant bioluminescent mushroom caps form glowing archways, casting dappled light on a clear path. The central subject is a majestic, silhouetted cervid (deer) standing in a field of glowing, stylized flora. The overall aesthetic is whimsical and ethereal, combining Art Nouveau lines with clean, modern graphic design. Use deep sapphire blues, glowing teal accents, and warm magenta highlights. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, with the deer prominently positioned as the focal point. High contrast, clean vector-like quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, messy, ugly, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grayscale, photorealistic
